en.extract:
The yellow-bellied hyliota (Hyliota flavigaster) is a species of Hyliota. It is found in Angola, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ivory Coast, Ethiopia, Gabon, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Kenya, Malawi, Mali, Mozambique, Nigeria, Rwanda, Senegal, Sierra Leone, South Sudan, Tanzania, Togo, Uganda, and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests.

[[File:Yellow-bellied Hyliota 115ND500 DSC5439.jpg|thumb|Yellow-bellied hyliota]]

The '''yellow-bellied hyliota''' ('''''Hyliota flavigaster''''') is a species of ''[[Hyliota]]''. It is found in [[Angola]], [[Burkina Faso]], [[Burundi]], [[Cameroon]], [[Central African Republic]], [[Republic of the Congo]], [[Democratic Republic of the Congo]], [[Ivory Coast]], [[Ethiopia]], [[Gabon]], [[Gambia]], [[Ghana]], [[Guinea]], [[Guinea-Bissau]], [[Kenya]], [[Malawi]], [[Mali]], [[Mozambique]], [[Nigeria]], [[Rwanda]], [[Senegal]], [[Sierra Leone]], [[South Sudan]], [[Tanzania]], [[Togo]], [[Uganda]], and [[Zambia]]. Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s.
